goal: apply native TC4 aspect colors throughout aspect/research rendering
implemented: Aspect.java exposes nativeColor, argbColor and textColor.
ResearchTableScreen aspect grid uses native aspect border/background colors.
ResearchTableScreen selected/result labels use native aspect colors.
ResearchNoteScreen slot colors use placed aspect native colors.
ResearchNoteScreen required aspects keep gold marker but also use native fill color.
ResearchNoteScreen aspect palette uses native aspect colors.
ResearchNoteScreen links mix the native colors of connected aspects.
Research note and research table chat messages use native TextColor where practical.
not_yet_final: Exact TC4 shader/blend values for glyphs and lines are still not reproduced.
Some older screens/tooltips outside research may still use ChatFormatting colors.
Full native color pass should later include wand focus particles, jar fills and aura node blending.
